\"VARIYA: I created Karma using two node: "VARIYA: I created Karma using two nodes.
One node has the power to analyze and se: One node has the power to analyze and see the true path.
The other sees the path of destruction. Corruption fills this node.
In order to create a future true for all: In order to create a future true for all walks of life, one must see both the good and bad.
Oddly, these separate nodes have gained: Oddly, these separate nodes have gained a sort of sentience and are able to split apart from Karma itself.
They have taken the form of two children: They have taken the form of two children, around the age of 10-12 years.
I'm not certain why they chose this, but: I'm not certain why they chose this, but I have learned to accept and love them as my own.
However, above all else, they must act t: However, above all else, they must act together as Karma and enact the ordinance assigned to them.
I must not allow myself to become too cl: I must not allow myself to become too close to the both of them.
Zed and Lorna... The eyes of the future. Whether it be saved, or ruined."

\"ZED: It's bad enough that I have to de: "ZED: It's bad enough that I have to deal with the other girl, but now \v[12] is a pain in my side.
When mother decided to choose \\v[12] to: When mother decided to choose \v[12] to be the next Interceptor...
I wonder if it was a deliberate choice i: I wonder if it was a deliberate choice in order to test me.
I mean, what else is the point of an Int: I mean, what else is the point of an Interceptor?
Karma's design is absolute. There are no: Karma's design is absolute. There are no flaws in its mechanisms.
So the Interceptor is sort of a... Chaot: So the Interceptor is sort of a... Chaotic variable to make things more interesting, I suppose?
There have been Interceptors like \\v[12: There have been Interceptors like \v[12] before.
I'll crush this one just like the others: I'll crush this one just like the others."
\"ZED: \\v[12] is becoming a much bigger: "ZED: \v[12] is becoming a much bigger pain in the neck than I expected.
I can see the manipulation both of them: I can see the manipulation both of them are doing, but I can't do anything to stop it.
For one, anything that happens in Zeight: For one, anything that happens in Zeight is completely out of my field of view.
It's a rule of Zeight, created by mother: It's a rule of Zeight, created by mother. An annoying one, but not one I can't work with.
Lorna uses her <i>primitive</i> method o: Lorna uses her primitive method of her corruption to create Rift Beasts.
The inner darkness found in a Pokémon's: The inner darkness found in a Pokémon's heart is brought to the forefront.
It's painfully cliché, and at best, just: It's painfully cliché, and at best, just moderately powerful.
But <i>my</i> Karma Beasts are made usin: But my Karma Beasts are made using aspects found in humans and their bond with a Pokémon they have in their disposal.
Not only is it more refined, but I find: Not only is it more refined, but I find that the power they exhibit is far greater.
Not only that, but my command, \"Stop \\: Not only that, but my command, "Stop \v[12]", gives them all the tools they need to succeed.
If I'm not allowed to personally interfe: If I'm not allowed to personally interfere, then I'll just have to indirectly do so with my Karma Beasts."
\"ZED: It's quite hilarious that the bir: "ZED: It's quite hilarious that the bird boy I wrote ended up being very useful.
All I had to do was notify him of his ir: All I had to do was notify him of his irrelevance in past iterations of my script.
However, this brings in some implication: However, this brings in some implications that I am not happy with.
I wrote Talon to be a strong-hearted per: I wrote Talon to be a strong-hearted person whose optimism brings him through any drip of adversary.
But he folded so easily... He's acting o: But he folded so easily... He's acting outside my own jurisdiction.
This concerns me. How many other charact: This concerns me. How many other characters are able to do similar things?
Well, it doesn't matter. He's gone now. \v[12] used that spell, End of Night, on him.
It doesn't scare me, though. End of Nigh: It doesn't scare me, though. End of Night is primitive."
\"ZED: Aelita is next on my list to turn: "ZED: Aelita is next on my list to turn into a Karma Beast.
But it was a bad decision.
It seems having a strong sense of self a: It seems having a strong sense of self and a good deal of mental strength helps resist the transformation.
That's not really all on her necessarily: That's not really all on her necessarily, though.
Aelita has a supportive friend group tha: Aelita has a supportive friend group that's there for her whenever she falters.
As long as that friend group exists, Ael: As long as that friend group exists, Aelita may be untouchable.
Or at least, for the moment. No one's in: Or at least, for the moment. No one's invincible.
Well, for now, I think I'll keep her in: Well, for now, I think I'll keep her in reserves. I have another person on my list who is much more fallible..."
\"ZED: Lorna keeps bugging me to help de: "ZED: Lorna keeps bugging me to help deal with this issue with \v[12].
But she is nothing short of <i>useless</: But she is nothing short of useless.
All she's useful for is being Karma's Le: All she's useful for is being Karma's Left Eye.
When we fuse together and become Karma,: When we fuse together and become Karma, the power I feel is so immense.
Other than that I prefer she just lock h: Other than that I prefer she just lock herself in her room and shut up.
I have no idea why mother would purposef: I have no idea why mother would purposefully insert a virus within Karma.exe.
Now I have to co-pilot Karma when I shou: Now I have to co-pilot Karma when I should have been enough for it in the first place.
I bet if Lorna didn't exist, the trouble: I bet if Lorna didn't exist, the troubles here would have been solved several millennias ago."

\"ZED: I know exactly why mother left me: "ZED: I know exactly why mother left me and the virus behind.
This must be another test to see if I'm: This must be another test to see if I'm capable enough to handle this.
That's fine with me. I like challenging: That's fine with me. I like challenging tasks to prove my competence.
The only problem is that Lorna is here t: The only problem is that Lorna is here to hold me back constantly.
Mother said she was once a human, but sh: Mother said she was once a human, but she gave up that form to become the absolute overseer.
But I think she is lying about that.
I've checked her data. She doesn't actua: I've checked her data. She doesn't actually have much power to change anything at all...
There are some aspects of her own self t: There are some aspects of her own self that she keeps encrypted.
Despite it all, it's quite clear that mo: Despite it all, it's quite clear that mother is very, very capable.
Her knowledge on all these different wor: Her knowledge on all these different worlds and scenarios far exceeds mine.
I want to be just as good as her, someda: I want to be just as good as her, someday."

\"ZED: Karma... The being that is made o: "ZED: Karma... The being that is made out of equal parts me and Lorna.
Karma is the most powerful being to ever: Karma is the most powerful being to ever exist.
Although it is combination of both Lorna: Although it is combination of both Lorna and I, Karma is more than the sum of our parts.
And as such, Karma has its own conscious: And as such, Karma has its own consciousness separate from the both of us.
While Lorna and I can make subtle change: While Lorna and I can make subtle changes within Karma's psyche, it is mostly entirely up to Karma.
...This makes Karma a bit dangerous. Eve: ...This makes Karma a bit dangerous. Even to us.

Like that deal with that stupid woman.
Who <i>thinks</i> she's got the upper ha: Who thinks she's got the upper hand, but she never did.
It's because of Karma that we are in som: It's because of Karma that we are in some trouble now.
We have no choice to become Karma.
If only there was a way to control it be: If only there was a way to control it better."

\"LORNA: Rift Pokémon are Pokémon that c: "LORNA: Rift Pokémon are Pokémon that come into contact with Rift Matter.

While Zed's role as the Right Eye is to: While Zed's role as the Right Eye is to see possible happy futures.
Erm, anyway... Rift Matter corrupts the: Erm, anyway... Rift Matter corrupts the sequence of code within the being.
I guess I should say \"being\", because: I guess I should say "being", because technically any living thing in contact with enough Rift Matter will become corrupted.
Anyways, when something that comes onto: Anyways, when something that comes onto my plate when coming into contact with Rift Matter...
It's my job to design them. I'm not too: It's my job to design them. I'm not too good at design, but I always admired how scary monsters looked in video games and stuff.
So I just try to make them look as scary: So I just try to make them look as scary as possible.
Zed says they look far too childish and: Zed says they look far too childish and on the nose.
But it doesn't matter how I designed the: But it doesn't matter how I designed them, Zed would find a way to tear me apart..."
\"LORNA: The fish Pokémon that wanted to: "LORNA: The fish Pokémon that wanted to so desperately become a dragon...

And he will look after all the Magikarp: And he will look after all the Magikarp that have been isolated due to their weaknesses..."
\"LORNA: This Chandelure sadly perished: "LORNA: This Chandelure sadly perished due to one of my own experiments...
Zed couldn't help but laugh at me at how: Zed couldn't help but laugh at me at how stupid I am... how worthless I can be...

\"LORNA: Poor Volcanion was pulled from: "LORNA: Poor Volcanion was pulled from its mother deep from within Valor Mountain...

See? Look at how much you can accomplish: See? Look at how much you can accomplish just by yourself!
And you are so young! Just wait--\\nWhen: And you are so young! Just wait--\nWhen you are older no one will be able to stand that power."
"LORNA: Zed is being difficult again...\nWe planned out Team Xen's entire course once before together.

\"LORNA: Mother said that I was special,: "LORNA: Mother said that I was special, and that I am something Zed could never be.
That's why Zed needs me, and vice versa.
But Zed only treats me like he has to pu: But Zed only treats me like he has to put up with me.

I told her... I told her this is what wo: I told her... I told her this is what would happen if she left Zed and I alone.
But she said we needed to work out our d: But she said we needed to work out our differences, and that our fighting is also a way for our AI to learn.
What else is there to learn? I already k: What else is there to learn? I already know that Zed hates me.
Do I hate him? I don't know.
No matter what he does to me, I can't he: No matter what he does to me, I can't help but not hate him-- Instead I try to prove myself each and every time.
Did Variya program me this way?\nIf so... I..."

This whole journey started because \\PN: This whole journey started because \PN was in the right place at the right time.
